apihelp-pollsubmitvote-param-poll: Aqoonsiga Ra'yi-ururinta, sida 832A5FA2C2583A5732B90CEFF658FE25; Aqoonsiyada (IDs) waxaa lagu sameeyaa in la surto (hash) xogta la geliyey (su'aasha + xulashooyinka jawaabta, kuwaas oo ah qoraalka u dhaxeeya sumadaha <poll>...</poll>) iyadoo la isticmaalayo hab-algorithm-ka MD5 hashing, ka dibna natiijada loo beddelo FAR WAAWEYN iyadoo la adeegsanayo shaqada strtoupper ee PHP
apihelp-pollsubmitvote-param-answer: Aqoonsiga nambarka ee xulashada jawaabta; isticmaal 0 si aad u laabato cod horey loo dhiibtay
apihelp-pollsubmitvote-example-1: Gudbi jawaabta saddexaad (3) ee ra'yi-ururinta leh aqoonsiga 832A5FA2C2583A5732B90CEFF658FE25
ajaxpoll-desc: Wuxuu oggolaanayaa ra'yi-ururinno ku salaysan AJAX iyadoo la adeegsanayo sumadda <poll>
ajaxpoll-vote-error: Waxaa jirtay dhibaato xog shaqaynta codkaaga ah, fadlan isku day markale.
ajaxpoll-your-vote: Waxaad u codaysay "$1" taariikhda $3 markay ahayd $4. Waxaad ku beddeli kartaa codkaaga adoo gujinaya jawaab ka duwan kuwa hoose.
ajaxpoll-no-vote-results-after-voting: Fadlan hoos ka codee. Natiijooyinka waxaa la tusi doonaa marka aad codaysid ka dib.
ajaxpoll-info: Waxaa jirey {{PLURAL:$1|hal cod|$1 codad ah}} tan iyo markii ra'yi-ururinta la abuuray $2.
ajaxpoll-submitting: Fadlan sug, waxaa la gudbinayaa codkaaga.
ajaxpoll-readonly: Ra'yi ururintan lama codeyn karo, xogta kaydka waa la xiray sababta soo socota awgeed: $1.
ajaxpoll-view-results-permission: Xaq uma lihid inaad aragto natiijooyinka ra'yi ururintan.
ajaxpoll-view-results-before-vote-permis: Xaq uma lihid inaad aragto natiijooyinka ra'yi ururintan ka hor inta aadan codeyn.
ajaxpoll-revoke-vote: Waxaan rabaa inaan ka laabto codkayga
right-ajaxpoll-vote: U codee ra'yi ururinta ku salaysan AJAX
right-ajaxpoll-view-results: Arag natiijooyinka ra'yi-ururinta ku salaysan AJAX
right-ajaxpoll-view-results-before-vote: Arag natiijooyinka ra'yi ururinta ku salaysan AJAX ka hor inta aan la codeyn
action-ajaxpoll-vote: U codee ra'yi ururinta ku salaysan AJAX
action-ajaxpoll-view-results: Arag natiijooyinka ra'yi ururinta ku salaysan AJAX
action-ajaxpoll-view-results-before-vote: Arag natiijooyinka ra'yi ururinta ku salaysan AJAX ka hor inta aan la codeyn
